posts.title: B.Tech in Computer Science Engineering
posts.body:
Cochin University of Science and Technology (CUSAT)
Kochi, India
June 2023 - Present
GPA: 8.0

Active involvement as Team Lead for Tech Fest Dhishna and College Cultural Fest Sargam. Also completed IEDC Innovation & Design Bootcamp Phase II.

posts.title: Cybersecurity Certifications
posts.body:
• Google Cybersecurity Analyst Certificate (Coursera) - SIEM, SOC tools, Network Security
• Certified Cybersecurity Educator Professional (CCEP) - Red Team Leaders
• Tata Group - Cybersecurity Analyst Job Simulation (Forage)
• Forage Cybersecurity Internships (Visa, AIG, Datacom, Airindia)
• IT Security: Defense against the digital dark arts (Coursera/Google)
• Currently pursuing: CEH, SAL1 from tryhackme

posts.title: Technical Skills Profile
posts.body:
Programming Languages:
Python, C, C++, Bash, SQL, Django, RestfulAPI

Cybersecurity Tools:
Wireshark, Nmap, Wazuh, SPLUNK, Metasploit, Nessus, OpenVAS, Wireless Vulnerability tools, JOHN, HASHCAT

Operating Systems:
Linux (Kali, Ubuntu), Windows

Other Skills:
Critical Thinking, Networking, Strong communication skills, Leadership qualities, Latex, MS Office
